summary: Hospitals designated as "America's Best Hospitals" are associated with quicker door-to-balloon times and lower door-in-door-out intervals, leading to more timely reperfusion therapy. This results in significantly improved patient outcomes by reducing cardiac damage and increasing survival rates after an acute myocardial infarction.
